Six ages, six ventures — from a Carousell side-hustle at 11 to advising a hedge fund at 14. Scroll to rewind through it.

The Timeline

Every Age, Every Chapter

From 11 to 16, in reverse. Tap the icons for photos.

16
O-Levels Year

Represented school at the National FINLIT competition, hosted at Temasek Polytechnic.

15
Sport & Trade

Represented Holy Innocents' High for Badminton at the National School Games.

Worked as a real-estate photographer alongside my father.

14
Gao Capital

Worked as a Videographer, Editor, and Media Advisor at Gao Capital, a hedge fund — overseeing intern-led media production and giving final content approval.

Assisted with operations and marketing for an e-commerce store on Carousell specialising in technology and computer peripherals.

13
E-Commerce

Continued assisting with operations and marketing for the Carousell store specialising in technology and computer peripherals.

12
Twitch

Live-streamed on Twitch, engaging with viewers and collaborating with prominent Singaporean YouTubers with a combined subscriber base of over 800K.

11
First Venture

Started a digital service building and selling computer peripherals through Carousell.
